events.event_name: 阿里QoderWork推出峰谷Token
events.core_topic: 阿里QoderWork推出峰谷Token，夜间使用Qwen3.7低至2折
key_facts: 6月23日晚，阿里QoderWork推出“峰谷Token”
Agent在每晚22:00到次日08:00运行可自动享受优惠
Qwen3.7-Max模型低至2折
国内首个上线“峰谷Token”的Agent产品
evidence: 输入摘要：'6月23日晚，阿里QoderWork推出“峰谷Token”，Agent在每晚22:00到次日08:00运行可自动享受优惠，其中Qwen3.7-Max模型低至2折。这是国内首个上线“峰谷Token”的Agent产品，将大幅降低用户的使用成本。'
events.why_it_matters: 峰谷Token模式降低了Agent使用成本，可能推动Agent产品普及

events.event_name: Claude Code大升级
events.core_topic: Claude Code大升级，LLM用户界面第三次变革
key_facts: 这是LLM用户界面的第三次重大变革
第一次是网页版聊天，第二次是桌面应用
这一次，LLM变成了一个独立、持续运行的系统，拥有组织内的工具和上下文，能与人类团队协同工作
evidence: 输入摘要：'这是LLM用户界面的第三次重大变革。第一次是网页版聊天，第二次是桌面应用，而这一次，LLM变成了一个独立、持续运行的系统，拥有组织内的工具和上下文，能与人类团队协同工作。'
events.why_it_matters: LLM从对话工具演变为协同系统，可能改变软件开发模式

events.core_topic: 正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮融资，多家上市企业联合加持

events.event_name: 豆包2.1发布
events.core_topic: 豆包2.1发布，Agent完成芯片设计代码
key_facts: 豆包2.1发布，包含两个模型：Doubao-Seed-2.1-Pro和Doubao-Seed-2.1-Turbo
API服务已全量上线火山方舟
evidence: 标题和摘要明确提到豆包2.1发布，Agent完成芯片设计代码，模型名称和API上线信息

events.event_name: InSight: 自主技能获取框架
events.core_topic: InSight框架实现自主技能获取，无需人类演示
key_facts: InSight framework unlocks autonomous skill acquisition by rendering VLAs steerable at the primitive-action level.
Evaluated across simulation and real-world manipulation tasks without any human demonstrations of target skills.
evidence: The abstract states: 'We present InSight, a framework that unlocks autonomous skill acquisition by rendering VLAs steerable at the primitive-action level...' and 'without any human demonstrations of these target skills.'
events.why_it_matters: 该框架可能推动机器人自主学习和技能获取的进展

events.event_name: FLUX3D: 高保真3D高斯生成
events.core_topic: FLUX3D框架实现高保真3D高斯生成，超越现有方法
key_facts: FLUX3D proposes Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT).
Outperforms all state-of-the-art methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.
evidence: The abstract states: 'FLUX3D... significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.'
events.why_it_matters: 3D生成技术的进步对计算机视觉和图形学有重要影响

events.event_name: OpenThoughts-Agent: 智能体模型数据配方
events.core_topic: OpenThoughts-Agent项目发布开源数据流水线，提升智能体模型性能
key_facts: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents.
The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models.
Fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model.
evidence: The paper reports a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model and strong scaling properties.
events.why_it_matters: 开源数据流水线有助于推动智能体模型研究的开放性和可复现性

events.event_name: IV-CoT: 隐式视觉思维链用于结构感知文本到图像生成
events.core_topic: IV-CoT框架通过隐式视觉思维链提升文本到图像生成的结构感知能力
key_facts: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following.
IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade.
IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench.
evidence: The paper reports superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench, and demonstrates complementary roles of structural and semantic queries.
events.why_it_matters: 改进文本到图像生成的结构遵循能力，对创意应用和内容生成有重要意义

events.event_name: World Models in Pieces: 通用智能体的结构认证
events.core_topic: 提出结构认证框架，实现通用智能体的可认证部署
key_facts: In the big-world regime, agents cannot be universally capable and their ability is inevitably specialized across a world model in pieces.
We introduce structural certification, a transition-local framework that maps bounded goal-conditioned performance to entry-wise guarantees on the agent's internal world model.
We provide algorithms that filter specific transitions using deep compositional goals and prove that a general agent on these goals has a structural world model with a O(1/n) + O(δ) error bound.
evidence: The paper introduces structural certification and provides algorithms with error bounds, enabling certifiable deployment of general agents.
events.why_it_matters: 为通用智能体的安全部署提供了理论保证

events.event_name: 随机次梯度方法最后迭代的新界
events.core_topic: 随机次梯度方法最后迭代的优化误差界
key_facts: Proves that for fixed stepsizes η=Θ(1/√n) under i.i.d. noise, last iterate optimization error is order 1/√n.
Without i.i.d. assumption, error can be order (log n)/√n, resolving an open problem.
evidence: The abstract states: 'We prove that... the last iterate features an optimization error of order 1/√n... resolving negatively an open problem posed in Koren and Segal, COLT, 2020.'
events.why_it_matters: 解决了优化理论中的一个开放问题，对理解随机优化算法有重要意义

events.event_name: MoEngage收购AI代理技术

key_facts: The all-cash deal gives MoEngage access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers.
evidence: The summary states: 'The all-cash deal gives MoEngage access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers.'

events.event_name: Real vs. Complex Spectral Bases for Neural Operators
events.core_topic: 比较实数和复数谱基在神经算子中的表现，提出Hartley神经算子
key_facts: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain.
We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO.
Our central thesis is that the best basis is a property of the operator.
evidence: The paper introduces a new operator (HNO) and provides a predictive rule for choosing spectral basis based on operator symmetry.
events.why_it_matters: 为神经算子选择谱基提供理论指导

events.event_name: It's Complicated: AI辅助增强与替代沟通界面设计
events.core_topic: 探讨AI增强AAC界面的设计和评估复杂性
key_facts: Artificial intelligence (AI) can enhance what people who use augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) are able to do with their systems.
However, evaluating AI-powered AAC interfaces can be difficult.
evidence: The paper discusses challenges and proposes evaluation methods for AI-powered AAC interfaces.
events.why_it_matters: 关注AI在辅助技术中的应用，具有社会意义
